calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Mike Brewer As A Receiver
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., dba GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU's Motion for Appointment of a Receiver and to Appoint Mike Brewer as a Receiver is Granted. No opposition was filed. The Court appoints Michael Brewer as a receiver to carry out the enforcement of the judgment in this case including including the seizure and sale of liquor license number 470741. Michael David Lyndall has 20 days from the date of this order to pay the full judgment in lieu of the seizure and sale of the liquor license. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Arlene Barton; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
